name: Capture Thought to Second Brain
description: Automatically captures thoughts posted in Microsoft Teams with #brain or #capture hashtag and stores them in your Second Brain using Azure Functions.
instructions: This is a simplified template for building the Power Automate flow manually. Follow these steps in Power Automate designer:

steps.action: Trigger: When a new channel message is posted

configuration.description: Monitors a specific Teams channel for new messages
configuration.notes: You must have access to the team and channel you select

steps.action: Condition: Check if message contains hashtag

configuration.description: Only process messages with #brain or #capture hashtag
configuration.notes: Use 'Or' condition in Power Automate to check for either hashtag

configuration.description: Remove hashtag and trim whitespace from message
configuration.notes: This removes both hashtags. Add trim() function if needed: trim(replace(...))

configuration.description: Send the cleaned message to your capture Azure Function
notes: Replace <YOUR-FUNCTION-APP> with your actual Azure Function App name
Replace <YOUR-FUNCTION-KEY> with the function key from Azure Portal
To get function key: Azure Portal → Function App → Functions → capture → Function Keys → Copy 'default' key

configuration.description: Parse the JSON response from the Azure Function
configuration.notes: Click 'Use sample payload to generate schema' and paste a sample response from your function for easier setup

configuration.description: Post a confirmation reply in the Teams thread using an adaptive card
configuration.action: Post adaptive card in a chat or channel
notes: The adaptive card will be posted as a reply to the original message
Users will see a formatted confirmation with extracted metadata
If any field is empty, it will show 'None' instead of blank

deployment_instructions.title: How to Create This Flow
steps: 3. Search for 'Microsoft Teams' trigger and select 'When a new channel message is posted'
4. Follow steps 1-6 above, adding each action in order
5. Save the flow with a descriptive name (e.g., 'Second Brain Capture')
6. Test by posting '#brain Test thought' in your Teams channel
prerequisites: Azure Function App deployed with /api/capture endpoint
Function key from Azure Portal (Functions → capture → Function Keys)
Permission to create flows in your organization

troubleshooting.flow_not_triggering: Ensure you selected the correct Team and Channel in step 1
troubleshooting.http_401_error: Check that your function key is correct and not expired
troubleshooting.http_500_error: Check Azure Function logs in Application Insights for errors
troubleshooting.adaptive_card_not_showing: Verify the Parse JSON schema matches your function response
troubleshooting.no_topics_extracted: The LLM might need better content - try more descriptive thoughts

example_usage.input_message: #brain Discussed with Alice about implementing vector search for the knowledge base. Need to evaluate Cosmos DB vs Azure AI Search. Action: Schedule follow-up meeting next week.

notes: This is a MANUAL SETUP GUIDE, not an importable flow JSON
Power Automate flow exports are complex and version-specific
Following these steps ensures compatibility with your tenant
The flow will run automatically once saved and enabled
